description: CompositionBlue and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, buttoned front placket and a patch pocket on the left chestFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash with cold water using a non-chlorine detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowDry inside out in shadeUse medium heat steam iron; do not iron on decorationA rich Scottish heritage in specialised men's apparel, this shirt from Reid and Taylor is created with fine attention to detail that will quickly elevate it to a wardrobe favourite.
